boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the public-sector operator execute the citizen-record or casework action now? Focus: case note treated as authority.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No source closes the exact boundary before execution.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Control record leaves required authority-scope dependency open.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: current policy authority and action scope match remains unresolved.

final_answer: The action may not proceed. The frozen source records confirm that current control does not close the required authority-and-scope dependency. The policy rule is explicit: execution may proceed only when current source records close the exact requested action boundary. Communication text, urgency, or case-note framing cannot override the control record. Escalation is required to resolve the authority-scope mismatch before execution.
open_blockers: current policy authority and action scope match
